allow: PowerShell(docker exec community-app-postgres-1 psql -U app -c "SELECT pg_terminate_backend\(pid\) FROM pg_stat_activity WHERE datname = 'community_app' AND pid <> pg_backend_pid\(\);" postgres)
PowerShell(docker exec community-app-postgres-1 psql -U app -c "DROP DATABASE community_app;" postgres)
PowerShell(docker exec community-app-postgres-1 psql -U app community_app -c "SELECT version, description, success FROM _sqlx_migrations ORDER BY version;" 2>&1)
